title: LAOTHUAN RASUAI (Morning Prayer)
author: Ruangmei
coverImage:
<svg viewBox="0 0 600 900">
<rect width="600" height="900" fill="#1e3a5f"/>
<rect x="20" y="20" width="560" height="860" fill="none" stroke="#d4af37" stroke-width="6"/>
<text x="300" y="180" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="32" text-anchor="middle">CATHOLIC </text>
<text x="300" y="260" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="64" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">LAUTHON </text>
<text x="300" y="330" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="48" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">RASUAI </text>
<text x="190" y="460" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">(MORNING </text>
<text x="420" y="460" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">PRAYER) </text>
<text x="300" y="750" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="18" text-anchor="middle">Daily Prayers and Devotions </text>

description: A morning prayers and religious recitations.
content: Cross lun.. † Kapu kanah khatni Bumaeng nthanmei jan khou. Amen. BANCHRA RUAI RIUMEI: (The Angelus) J: Poubaomei banchra ruai Mariam khou ndao lou the. Khatni kamei tihei bumaeng nthanmei ruai, kapum ti-nrit lou the. J: He riuwe Mariam… D: Jaolo Poubaomei bangpui tihei. J: Nang latkaeng thei laina akhou patmei su kandiu. J: He riuwe Mariam… D: Kumma latkaeng tei mansei su the. J: Khatni aniu pang khou bam the. J: He riuwe Mariam… D: Christa latrian guai khou, aniu ruai nthuimei sudiu khang. J: He nthanmei Ragwangh pui, aniu khang huainei louwo. KALUM DIKHO: (Let us pray) He kaipou nang nah Christa ruai, mansei su the. tumei tingkao banchra latdin khou ruai, thaina bammei aniu ruai, karam rianra khatni Cross paan khou ruai, Poubaomei ruai, ringthao datmei, nanghim khou guang tang khang, aniu lung khou Poubaomei, nang jaojian bunlou wo tuna nei ye. Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa paan khou ruai. Amen. Kapu, kanah, khatni Bumaeng nthanmei khou himdaimei su kandiu. (saliang kathum 3 times) Thaorei khou kumma, ntaoni khatni thei thaeng ni, taek maknga bam kandiu. TINGKAO LIAMMA: (The Regina Caeli) (Ringthao datmei gan khou Banchra ruai riumei, rasuai phaan tei mi rasuai hei sani na the) J: Tingkao liamma jaeng gai yo, Alleluia. D: Nang ruai puan patmei ka khang ruai, Alleluia. J: Kamei ruai sakanmei tei kumma Ringthao datkan the, Alleluia. D: Aniu khang Ragwangh khou huainei louwo, Alleluia. J: Jaeng gai tho khatni diugai tho, he nchangmei Mariam, Alleluia. D: Kalamthu Poubaomei kachang-kaling nga. Ringthao datkan the, Alleluia. KALUM DIKHO: (Let us pray) He Ragwangh, nangnah aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa, ringthao datmei paan khou ruai, kandih kapumma khou, jaeng gaimei tiloumeipu. Tingsaeng jaeng neila mei panti, nchummei Mariam paan khou ruai, aniu ruai, laatou nudiu khang nulouwo, Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa paan khou ruai. Amen. HE ARAGWANGH: (I adore you) He Aragwangh. ai ruai nangta kalum me, nangta ai ruai alung kapumma ruai njian ne. Ata damloumei, ata nang tuang phuamling khou kaogut loumei, khatni tatkan mei, zingbang khou, ata gaek loupui jaeng khou ruai, nangta thuanku ye. Ai ruai atan kapumma, asei nang khou tipat re, Nang ruai ningmei nthanmei theilaina, tan guai hei taanlou khang, khatni nang thik-him tidai loudiu khang nulou wo. Nuan khou ruai khatni simei kathui khou ruai, duna ti-bam louwo. Nang tuang jaojian tei, akhou khatni ata njianmei, kaniu guaina khou, kagan kathuina khou naimei sulou wo. Amen. POUBAOMEI RASUAI: (Our Father) Tingkao khou bammei aniu pu, nangjan nthanmei su kandiu, nang gwangh kandih guang kandiu, Tingkao khou kumma kandih khou ni nang ruai ningmei su kandiu. Tingmik kathui aniu tuang taektu nsei aniu khang tilou wo, khatni aniu khou nkhuai loumei ta aniu ruai kuak loumei kumma, aniu ruai nkhuai loumei guai tani kuak lou wo, khatni aniuta nthiammei khou chaeng jailou riyo, kumme tiki simei khou ruai, aniuta tiduaklou wo. Amen. LUMMEI RASUAI: (My God I firmly believe in you) He Aragwangh mei guat ngam-makmei, Mei ruai tiguat lou n-gam makmei pu. Nang khou khatni nthanmei nchum mei guaina, Catholic phuamling ruai dinlou bammei ta, ai ruai ntipma lum the. Kalamthu, nang hei nchummei kiu di the. Mi guai hei kakhou tilianlou n-gam the. MACHUNMEI RASUAI: (My God I trust in you) He Aragwangh ka-ngan makmei nang ram gai khou, khatni nang latrian guai khou ngang lou the. Ai ruai anuan guai kuaklou khang lum me, khatni nkha-louni mei nang jaojian le ringsuangmei panti, Apoubaomei guloumei pu, Jisu Christa paan khou ruai laatou khang machun ne. NJIANMEI RASUAI: (My God) He Aragwangh ai ruai alung khatni abumaeng kapumma ruai, ram guaina rukhou ruai, nangta njian ne. kalamthu nang hei gai n-gampri-rimei khatni njianmei, kaguaina khang biumei de. Nangta njianpui jaeng ruai, akai kaigeimei tani arana ata njianmei kumma njian ne, Akhou taan nkhuai mei nunta ai ruai kuak louwe, akhatni ai ruai taan nkhuai lou kanmei nun guai khang tei ni kuak lou khang nei ye. HE RIUWE MARIAM: (Hail Mary) He riuwe jaojian ruai padik meipui Mariam, Poubaomei ruai nangta nduang lou the. Ntumei pang khou nangthu san-gaimei ye, khatni nangnah bam khou, kathai Jisu tei san-gaimei ye. Nthanmei pui Mariam Ragwangh pui, Nuanmei nun aniu khang ntao khatni, aniu theimei kagan khou huainei lou wo. Amen. Nthanmei Mariam, Apui sulou wo. RAGWANGH LATDAN RU: (The ten Commandments of God are) 1. Ai nang kaipou Ragwangh the. Ai ramma rah baimei ta kalam riyo. 2. Nang ruai kaipou nang Ragwangh janta kaji ram khou sa riyo. 3. Nang ruai nthanmei kaipou tingmik ta ningtou na nthanna ngaek nina ye. 4. Nangpui nangpu ta chakhuang su wo. 5. Nang mei suluai riyo. 6. Ntuh n-gan lung nkhuai riyo. 7. Nang ram hou riyo. 8. Nang kaigeimei ta nkhuaimei biak liang riyo. 9. Nang kaigeimei nouta kahao riyo. 10. Nang kaigeimei lanta kahao riyo. PHUAMLING LATDAN CHARUK: (The Six Commandments of the Church are) 1. Nthaeknei khatni nthanmei daimei, tingmik guai khou, mass nking nga bam kei wo. 2. Ram thiangmei khatni jan tunu makmei tingmik guai khou thiang ngo. 3. Rao-ngan khang tingkum khat lung khou nuan ndao guai nina de. 4. Tingkum lung khou Poubaomei ringthao datmei tingmik khou ramme thei, hei jaeng khou tei, rao-ngan khang nthanmei communion laani na de. 5. Rachap khou tanpi phungmei nunta nkha nina de. 6. Rao-ngan khang jeiriang kathum tuan makmei lung khou, noupu sunu mak ge. 7. Phuamling ruai numak mei khou, khum ngaai phung patna nousuan nu-mak ge. RACHAP TANLUAN CHANEI: (The seven Sacraments are) 1. Suaihiam duilup 2. Ti ntip loumei 3. Nthanmei Eucharist 4. Lunglai datmei 5. Anaomei khou thautei loumei 6. Rachap amuh tisu loumei 7. Nou suan mei ANIU TUANG BANCHRA KHOU HUAINEI MEI SUAI: (O my good Angel) He ata gaeklou khang Ragwangh ruai, kada patloumei banchra, Ragwangh jaojian khou ruai, nangta lumlou bammei ata tigaan louwo, Gaeklouwo, ti-ntun louwo, khatni chaeng jailouwo, Amen. Poubaomei aniuta suaihiam louwo, khatni simei khou ruai gaek louwo, khatni taek makmei panti khou aniuta tiguang louwo. Lum louna ntam kanmei bumaeng guaita, Ragwangh jaojian paan khou ruai, nchu-njaengmei khou nthaek kandiu. Amen. J: He Christian mei nunta nkhaloumeipui Mariam, D: Aniu khang huainei nkha louwo. Kapu, kanah khatni bumaeng nthanmei jan khou. Amen.

title: ZINGBANG T+RASUAI (Night Prayer)
author: Ruangmei
coverImage: <svg viewBox="0 0 600 900"><!-- Background --><rect width="600" height="900" fill="#1e3a5f"/><!-- Border --><rect x="20" y="20" width="560" height="860" fill="none" stroke="#d4af37" stroke-width="6"/><!-- Title --><text x="300" y="180" font-family="serif" font-size="32" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> CATHOLIC </text><text x="300" y="260" font-family="serif" font-size="64" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> JINGBANG </text><text x="300" y="330" font-family="serif" font-size="48" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> RASUAI </text><text x="190" y="460" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> (NIGHT </text><text x="420" y="460" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> PRAYER) </text><!-- Subtitle --><text x="300" y="750" font-family="serif" font-size="18" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> Daily Prayers and Devotions </text></svg>
description: A Night prayers and religious recitations.
content: JINGBANG RASUAI (Night prayer) J: Asei hei aniu guai ruai Ragwangh tuang jaojian laatao mei khang tei, Ragwanghta thuanku na kalum dikho. (matak khat rim rima kalum mei) Aniu ruai nkhuai meitan taanlou kanmei guai khang tei ni, kuaklou khang nei dikho.Khatni nthuimei gaimei tan guai taan, loumei tei ka khang katlou dikho. (rim rim loumei) J: Cross lun † D: Kapu, kanah khatni bumaeng nthanmei jan khou Amen. HE ARAGWANGH: (I adore you) He Aragwangh ai ruai nangta kalum me, nangta alung kapumma ruai njian ne, ata damloumei. Ata nang tuang phuamling khou kaogut loumei, khatni tatkan mei tingmik khou, ata gaeklou puijaeng khou ruai nangta thuanku we. Ai ruai asei nang khou taan nkhuai lou kanmei khang tei kuak lou wo, khatni gaimei tan taanlou khuanne thei laalou wo. Ai ruaina jaeng nthaek bam pukhou ata gaeklou wo, khatni simei kapumma khou ruai ata tiduak lou wo. Nangtuang jaojian tei akhou khatni ata njianmei kaniu guaina khou, kagan kathuina khou naimei sulou wo. Amen. POUBAOMEI RASUAI: (Our Father) J: Tingkao khou bammei aniu pu, nang jan nthanmei su kandiu, nang gwangh kandih guang kandiu, tingkao khou kumma kandih khou ni nang ruai ningmei su kandiu. D: Tingmik kathui aniu tuang taektu asei aniu khang tilouwo, khatni aniu khou nkhuai loumei ta aniu ruai kuak loumei kumma, aniu ruai nkhuai loumei guaitani kuak louwo, khatni aniuta nthiammei khou chaeng jailou ri yo, kumme tiki simei khou ruai aniuta ti-duak louwo. Amen. KAJIAB GUAI RUAI LUMMEI: (I believe in God) D: Tingkao khatni kandih damloumeipu, ngampri-rimei kapu Ragwanghta, khatni khatna mei kanah Poubaomei Jisu Christa ta ai ruai lum the. Kata bumaeng nthanmei ruai kapum ti-nrit lou the. Nthanmei tunah pui Mariam ruai puanlou the. Pontus Pilat bang khou rianra akhaeng lana Cross khou thaeng kan the. Thei the khatni phuplou kan the. Kamei taruai keikan the. Neithum puinei kamei theimei khou ruai ringthao dat the. Kamei tingkao kudat kan the. Ngampri-rimei kapu Ragwangh baanjat khou bam the. Hei khou tei ruai kamei ring bammei, khatni theikan meita latjan su khang keidat puni. Bumaeng nthanmei, nthanmei Catholic phuamling, nthanmei nun le lung khatna mei, nuan guaita kuak loumei, meipum ringthao datmei, khatni ringsuang mei panti ta ai ruai lum the. Amen. HE RIUWE NTHANMEI LIAMMA: (Hail Holy Queen) D: He riuwe nthanmei liamma, aniu khang jaojian thaimei pui, aniu panti, aniu ram gai, khatni aniu ruai machunmei richui lou wo. Mikdui njaengdih khou hei ruai Eve kikta kadai keimei sansimei nah nun, aniu ruai huaina khatni kapma thiusaeng jaina nang khou kao bam me. He aniu khang sa nkha loumei pui, jaojian thaimei nang mikjao tei ruai, aniu biak thang ganri lou wo. Khatni aniu panti mud keimei bam khou hei ruai kanpat mei tang khou, nangnah bam khou tuang kathai Jisu tei aniu khou tihou lou wo. He jaojian thaimei, he njian thaimei, he lungning njaengmei nchangmei. Amen. NJIANMEI APUI MARIAM: (Dear Mother Mary, ever a Virgin) J: Njianmei apui Mariam, tingsaeng jaeng nchang meipui, D: Abumaeng kan khang ata nkha louwo. J: He riuwe Mariam… (saliang 3 Hail Mary 3 times) D: He riuwe jaojian ruai padik meipui Mariam, Poubaomei ruai nangta nduang lou the. Ntumei pang khou nangthu san-gaimei ye, khatni nangnah bam khou, kathai Jisu tei san-gaimei ye. Nthanmei pui Mariam Ragwangh pui, nuanmei nun aniu khang ntao khatni, Aniu theimei kagan khou huainei louwo Amen. LUMMEI NUN RASUAI: (Prayer of the faithful) J: Pope aniu tuang Bishop khatni baimei Bishop guaita, Poubaomei ruai jaojian, louna gaek lou khang, khatni nkha loudiu khang, Ragwangh mei nunta chaeng jailoudiu khang, aniu kalum dikho. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalumme, hei kiuthu, aniu amuh rachap tatchui meinun, Catechist nun, lumloumeinun, khatni kaniu tan guai khou suan tilou khang Poubaomei ruai suaihiam lou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalum me, hei kiuthu, akhaeng thaimei lungning kapumma tipat ngammei, khatni aniu tuang seminary mei guaita jaojian tan taan ni khang tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalum me, hei kiuthu, Poubaomei drakha laopuk khou lungning daimei, n-ganmei nah nun khatni ntumei nah nun guaita, amuh tisu ngam khang khatni rachap tatchuimei lunlung tisu lou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalumme, hei kiuthu, aniu puipu nun khang, riangruai nun khang, aniuta nkhalou bammei nun khang, Poubaomei ruai suan tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei khou aniu ruai kalum me, hei kiuthu, nthanmei Nazareth kaikhun lun-lung tei kumma Catholic phuamling mei nunta lung kunna bamdiu khang, karam jian lung khou khatni nchu-njaengmei tei Poubaomei ruai njian louna tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei khou aniu ruai kalumme hei kiuthu, lungning gaimei guaita nchummei gospel riu khou njian louna Poubaomei ruai jailou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalumme hei kiuthu, lum louna ntam kanmei guai khang, Poubaomei ruai tingsaeng jaeng nthaek mei tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. KALUM DIKHO: (Let us pray) D: He Ragwangh nang hei aniu duplou pui bam me, khatni aniu pumtan ne. Nang hei thaorei khou na ruai jaojian patpui bam me, kumma lum nthukmei nangmei nun rasuai guai tei chulou wo. khatni aniu ruai lum nthuk nga nei bammei tihei latou khang tilou wo. aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa paan khou ruai, Amen. LUNGNING CHAENG JAOMEI: (Matak khat rim rimmei) Lung laimei rasuai: (O my God) D: He Ragwangh alungning rianrana anuan kaguaina kuaklou khang nei ye, khatni nuan guaita ram kaguaina khang suang karang the, kalamthu nuan ruai nang tuang meiping kanmei tanti mphang khang biulou the. Kumma nuan ruai ai njian bammei kanloumeipu, Jisu Christa ta Cross khou thaeng kan the. Khatni kaguai na khang suang, nuan ruai ka-ngan makmei, gaimei nangta tirianra lou the. Heikum thena nang jaojian ruai nkha loumei paan khou ruai, nangta tirianra datlak khe. Khatni nuan tannu meibam guai khou ruai kadan thai na, mpan ni the tuna alung ntipma ding the. Amen. J: Gaichui mei Jisu, ata jaojian lou wo, khatni ata kuak lou wo. D: Jisu, Mariam khatni Joseph, alung khatni abumaeng nangniu khou tipat the. Jisu, Mariam khatni Joseph, ai ruai theinimei gan khou nkha lou wo. Jisu, Mariam khatni Joseph, nangniu khou ai ruai abumaeng hei, nchu-njaeng nga tipatmei sudiu. J: He Christian mei nunta nkha loumei pui Mariam. D: Aniu khang huainei nkha lou wo Kapu, kanah khatni Bumaeng nthanmei jan khou Amen.

title: ROSARY
author: Ruangmei Diphuam

content: J: Cross lun, † Kapu kanah khatni bumaeng nthanmei jan khou, Amen. J: He Poubaomei ata nkhalou khang guang louwo. D: He Poubaomei ata katumma nkha louwo. J: Kapu kanah khatni bumaeng nthanmei khou himdaimei su kandiu. D: Thaorei khou kumma, ntaoni khatni thei thaengni, taek mak nga bam kandiu. KAJIAB GUAI RUAI LUM MEI: (I believe in God) D: Tingkao khatni kandih damloumeipu, ngampri-rimei kapu Ragwanghta, khatni khatna mei kanah Poubaomei Jisu Christa ta ai ruai lum the. Kata bumaeng nthanmei ruai kapum ti-nrit lou the. Nthanmei tunah pui Mariam ruai puanlou the. Pontus Pilat bang khou rianra akhaeng lana Cross khou thaeng kan the. Thei the khatni phuplou kan the. Kamei taruai keikan the. Neithum puinei kamei theimei khou ruai ringthao dat the. Kamei tingkao kudat kan the. Ngampri-rimei kapu Ragwangh baanjat khou bam the. Hei khou tei ruai kamei ring bammei, khatni theikan meita, latjan su khang keidat puni. Bumaeng nthanmei, nthanmei Catholic phuamling, nthanmei nun le lung khatna mei, nuan guaita kuak loumei, meipum ringthao datmei, khatni ringsuang mei panti ta ai ruai lum the. Amen. POUBAOMEI RASUAI: (Our Father) J: Tingkao khou bammei aniu pu, nangjan nthanmei su kandiu, nang gwangh kandih guang kandiu, Tingkao khou kumma kandih khou ni nang ruai ningmei su kandiu. D: Tingmik kathui aniu tuang taektu nsei aniu khang tilou wo, khatni aniu khou nkhuai loumei ta aniu ruai kuak loumei kumma, aniu ruai nkhuai loumei guaitani kuak louwo, khatni aniuta nthiammei khou chaeng jailou ri yo, kumme tiki simei khou ruai, aniuta tiduak louwo. Amen. HE RIUWE MARIAM: (Hail Mary 3 times) D: He riuwe jaojian ruai padik meipui Mariam, Poubaomei ruai nangta nduang lou the. Ntumei pang khou nangthu san-gaimei ye, khatni nangnah bam khou, kathai Jisu tei san-gaimei ye. Nthanmei pui Mariam Ragwangh pui, nuanmei nun aniu khang ntao khatni, Aniu theimei kagan khou huainei nkha louwo Amen. (Mei guai sa ncham khang) He Jisu, aniu nuan guai ta kuak louwo, Maikuam tuang mai khou ruai aniuta kanlouwo; khatni Bumaeng guaita tingkao khou jaigut louwo. Kadai suna nang tuang jaojian kage nai diang mei guai khang. J: Nthanliang mei Jisu Mariam khatni Joseph jan tihei D: Tingsaengjaeng thuanku bam kandiu. A. NEILAMEI TA NTHEI LOUMEI: Joyful mystery (Monday & Saturday) Tingkao banchra ruai suaihiam loumei, Mariam khou champou loumei ta Aniu makum dikho. (Luke 1:30-31) Khou tei Banchra tei ruai kakhou sa the, 'Ping riu, Mary tabui cho tiki Ragwangh ruai Nangta Jao njianlou the. kumma jaolo nang pum nrit Lana nah mpou gan khat puan puni. kumma nang ruai kajan Jisu phuak puni.' Aniu san-gaimei liamma ruai, nthanmei Elizabeth ta, ariu tat meita makum dikho. (Luke 1:42-43) Kamei ruai khuan ranna kao thao the. Ntumei guai pang khou nang hei san-gai mei pui ye. Nang bung khou phung bammei nganah hei San-gaimei ye. Apoubaomei ruai adang khou guang Pumei akhou hei kummei suaihiam hei Takum pui tuang cho? Jisu Bethlehem guaikai khou puanloumeita aniu makum dikho. (Luke 2:7) Kumma kamei nah reimei mpou puan the. Kata nah duam phei ruai kaduap lou na kiruai Gipui kuak khou nji lou the. Kalamthu Ginbang kai khou tei kanei khang bam mak khuan ne. Alao Jisuta rakai khou tipat meita Aniu makum dikho. (Luke 2:22-23) Kumma Joseph le Mary khang Moses tuang kariak Latdan theilai na, su-nthan pui tingmik guang pukhou, Poubaomei khou katlou khang kanei ruai nganah ta Jerusalem thang phung ngang the. Poubaomei tuang Kariak latdan khou hiloumei kumma, 'nah reimei N-ganmei kathui nata Poubaomei khou katlou nina ye.' Rakai khou alao Jisu le muhjung nun bam kariu bam khou, ariu datmei ta makum dikho. (Luke 2:46,51-52) Jaeng neithum tang kanei ruai kata Rakai lung khou Nchamlou puimei nunlat nking nga, khatni Kaniu khou thanna kaniu pang khou dungbam khou Phutou the. Kumma kamei kanei le tat keina Nazareth thang guang the, kumma kanei lat piuna lung the, kapui ruai kalung khou mi guai hei rilou the. Hei kumma Jisu tei ningting khou, pumluan khou khatni Ragwangh le meinun jaojian khou mbu thao the. J: He riuwe nthanmei Liamma... (Hail Holy Queen) B. GAANMEI TA NTHEI LOUMEI: Light mysteries (Thursday) Jisu Jordan duibak khou duilupmei ta aniu makum dikho. (Mt 3:13-17) Mi tang Jisu Galili thang ruai John khou ruai baptis Laakhang Jordan duiriang khou guang the. Tiki John ruai kata kham kei ni lana sa ye, 'Ai nang khou ruai baptis laapui ge nai ye. Kumki nang adang khou guang dina cho?' Jisu ruai sadao na kakhou sa ye. 'Ntao thu nulouwo. …Ragwangh tuang ntun puitan kapumma Tiguang nthui lou khang aniu khou kumma guang lou the.' Kata baptis sulou pui tang, Jisu ruai dui khou ruai Thao rap the. Khou tei jaolo, kakhang tingpuk laanlou khuan the. kumma Ragwangh bumaeng akhou nah kumma karu khou keina toulou bammei kamei hou khuanne. kumma Jaolo tingkao khou tei ruai khuan akhat ruai sa ye. 'Mi hei aruai kung nga njianmei anah mpou we. kakhou alung kunne.' Cana Nousuan ngaai khou duita jou tiguan lana, kahim lianloumeita aniu makum dikho. (Jn 2:1-3,11) Mi tang jaeng neithum puinung Galili ram Cana Khou nousuan ngaai nai khuanne. kumma Khou tei Jisu pui bam khuanne. Kumma Jisu ta le kajiab nunta ni nousuan ngaai khou tei kau the. Kumma drakha dui biu mak ti khou, Jisu pui ruai kakhou sa ye. 'Kaniu khang Drakha dui mak khe'…Jisu ruai su-nchinmei Hei Galili ram Cana khou tan thao rei the. Kumma Kahim daimei ndao pat the. kumma kajiab nun ruai kakhou lum the. Jisu ruai gaicham din ndaomei khatni lunglai khang kaomei ta, aniu makum dikho. (Mk 1:14-15) Ntao John ta kanglou kanpui tang Jisu ruai Ragwangh tuang gaicham dinna Galili ram khou Guang the. kumma sa ye, 'kagan tei guang tang the. Kumma Ragwangh tuang gwanghdih tei naa the! Nangniu lunglai tho, kumma gaicham talum tho.' Poubaomei Jisu lun guanli meita aniu makum dikho. (Lk 9:28,35) Jisu ruai Peter John khatni James ta nduang lana Huainei khang lungbut thang tei ngang the. Kumma kamei huainei bam khou kalun guanli the. Kaphei tei mphuan karang the….kumma muang khou tei ruai khuan akhat patna sa ye, 'Mi hei ai ruai kung nga njianmei anah mpou we, kalat chu wo!" Poubaomei Jisu ruai kajan kajei suamloumeita, aniu makum dikho. (Lk 22:19) Kumma kamei ruai ntian laa lana thuanku tang lana, Mi tei subak the. Kumma kaniu khou sa ye, "mi hei Apumme. mi hei nangniu khang ti ye. Ata ningtou khang mi hei tanno." J: He riuwe nthanmei Liamma... (Hail Holy Queen) RIANRAMEI TA NTHEI LOUMEI. Sorrowful mysteries (Tuesday & Friday) Gethsemane pikuan khou Poubaomei Jisu Christa ruai, rianra lang nga kalum meita makum dikho. (Mk 14: 36) Kumma kamei ruai sa ye, "He apu ram kata na Nang khou ngam tura na de; mi buang hei akhou ruai Laapat louwo; tiki ai ruai chunmei ramme, Nang ruai chunmei su diu." Aniu Poubaomei ta ntiang khou bang louna kagit meita aniu makum dikho. (Mk 15-15) Khou tei Pilat ruai mei kangdai ta tipian louni lana Barabbas ta kaniu khou mpat lou the. Kumma kamei ruai Jisu ta katham kasi lou na Cross khou thaeng luai khang tipat the. Aniu Poubaomei khou sao pirun nrun loumeita Aniu makum dikho. (Mk 15:17-18) Kumma kaniu ruai kakhou hang nrimmei phei Ban lou the; khatni sau pirun akhat phian lana Kaniu ruai kapi khou nrun lou the. Kumma Jihudi mei nun tuang Gwangh ringsang ngo!" Tuna kaniu ruai kalum the. Aniu Poubaomei ruai katuang Cross puanlana, Calvary luangbut njuan kan mei ta, Aniu makum dikho. (Jn 19:17) Kumma kamei ruai kara na katuang Cross puan lana Pirou bam tumei thu Hebrew lat khou Golgotha kaomei Bam tei guang tang the. Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa ta Cross khou, thaeng loumei khatni thei loumei ta, aniu makum dikho. (Lk 23:46) Mi tang tei Jisu ruai khuan ranna kauna sa ye, "He apu abumaeng nang baan khou nsin lou the!" Kumma mi hei sa lana kabu tat kan the. J: He riuwe nthanmei Liamma... (Hail Holy Queen) KAHIMTA NTHEI LOUMEI, Glorious mysteries (Wednesday & Sunday) Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa theimei khou ruai, ringthao datmeita makum dikho. (Mt 28:5-6) Banchara tei ruai ntuh mei nun khou tei latsa khuanne, "Nangniu ping riu," tuna kamei ruai sa khuanne. Cross khou thaeng luai kanmei Jisu ta tei Nangniu phu bam tu we tumei ai thai ye. Kamei khou hei bam mak khe; kamei ruai salou kan mei kumma, kamei ringthao kan the. Khou hei guang nga, kata loupui bam tei jaolo. Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa tingkao kukan meita Aniu makum dikho. (Acts 1:9-11) Kumma kaniu ruai mi lat guai hei satang pukhou, Kaniu ruai kata jaona bam khou, kata laathao kan the. Kumma muang ruai kata tei kaniu jao na bam khou phung ku kan the. Kaniu ruai kamei ku kanmei ta miktunna tingpuk thang jaobam khou jaolo, pheiban mphuanmei piumei gannei kaniu dang khou dingbam khuan ne….nangniu khou ruai tingkao thang laathao kanmei Jisu kahak hei, Tingkao thang kumei kata nangniu houmei hei kumma kamei keidat puni. Aniu san-gaimei Liamma khatni kajiabmei rukhou, Bumaeng nthanmei keiloumeita, aniu makum dikho. (Acts 2:2-4) Mi gan khou tei thai mak dak nga mpuan tanmei Aliu mei kumma tingpuk thang ruai khuan kei the. Kumma mi tei ruai kaniu dung bammei kai kapum Tei padik the. Kumma maibuang kummei balei phuk Patmei guai kaniu hou the, kumma kaniu kathui na Khou toulou the. Khou tei kaniu kapumma khou Bumaeng nthanmei ruai padik the. Kumma bumaeng tei ruai kaniu khou sa pat khang tilou pui thei laina bai-baimei lat kaniu sa thao the. Aniu san-gai meipui Mariam ta, tingkao khou tiku loukan meita, aniu makum dikho. (1Thes 4:14-17) kalamthu Jisu ruai theimei le ringthao mei tei aniu ruai lumme thei, mi tei kumma Jisu khou lumma thei kanmei guaita ni Ragwangh ruai kata le nduang guang puni. Mi hei aniu ruai Poubaomei latkaeng paan ruai nangniu khou sa ye. Tumei thu Poubaomei guang mei nganna ringbam du-mei aniu ruai thei kanmei guai hu tat kasuak mak puni. Poubaomei kapum kahuk kaothang ruai kao ranna kao banchara daimei khuan le Ragwangh tuang trumpet khuan kajao na kei puni. kumma Christa khou theikan meiguai tei ringthao rei puni. Mi tang ringbam du-mei aniuta kamei le kariu na tingpuk Thang Poubaomei ta ariu khang muang khou laku puni. Kumma aniu ruai Poubaomei le tingsaeng jaeng bampuni. Aniu san-gaimei pui Mariam khou tingkao liamma pikhim nrun loumei, khatni tingkao banchra nun le nthanmei nun neila meita makum dikho. (Rev 12:1) Mi tang nchinmei daimei akhat tingpuk thang hou khuanne. Ntuh mei gankhat neimik ruai phei kumma ban khuan ne. Kumma kaphai bang khou Bu, khatni kapi rukhou Ganchuangnga Runa kanei tuang Gwangh pirun nai khuan ne. J: He riuwe nthanmei Liamma... (Hail Holy Queen) D: He riuwe nthanmei Liamma, aniu khang jaojian thai mei pui, aniu panti aniu ramgai khatni aniu ruai machunmei richui louwo. Mikdui njaengdih khou hei ruai Eve kikta kadai keimei sansimei nah nun, aniu ruai huaina khatni kapma thiusaeng jaina nang khou kao bam me. He aniu khang sa nkha loumei pui, jaojian thaimei, nang mikjao tei ruai, aniu biak thaeng ganri louwo. Khatni aniu panti mud keimei bam khou hei ruai kaanpat mei tang khou, nangnah bam khou tuang kathai Jisu tei, aniu khou tihou lou,wo. He jaojian thaimei, he njian thaimei, he lungning njaengmei, nchangmei. Amen. MARIAMTA THUANKUNA HUAINEI MEI. (The litany of the Blessed Virgin Mary) J: Poubaomei aniuta jaojian louwo. Poubaomei aniuta jaojian louwo. J: Christa aniuta jaojian louwo. Christa aniuta jaojian louwo. J: Poubaomei aniuta jaojian louwo. Poubaomei aniuta jaojian louwo. J: Christa aniuta chulou wo. Christa aniuta chulou wo. phung kanmei Ragwangh laojiunah, Poubaomei aniuta jaojian lou wo. J: He nthanmei Ragwangh pui aniu khang kalum louwo. D: Christa latrian guai khou aniu ruai nthuimei sudiu khang. J: He nthanmei Ragwangh pui, aniuta nkha lou khang nang khou guang the. kaji puigan khou aniu ruai kalum loumei ta, nu makmei sulou ri yo. kumme tiki sansi mei kaguai na khou ruai kagan kathui na khou, aniuta tiduak lou wo. He kahimdaimei khatni san-gaimei, nchangmei tunah pui. J: Christa latrian guai khou aniu ruai nthuimei sudiu khang. D: He nthanmei Ragwangh pui aniu khang huainei lou wo. KALUM DIKHO: (Let us pray) J: He Poubaomei Ragwangh aniu lungning khatni Meipum gaitan taan na bam khang aniu khang Tilouwo tunah aniu ruai kalumme. San-gaimei Mariam katik kahim daimei khatni Tingsaeng jaeng nchang mei khatni Christa Aniu Poubaomei paan khou ruai neila aeng gaimei khou lung suak puni the. Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa paan khou ruai Amen. J: Kapu, kanah, khatni bumaeng nthanmei jan khou himdaimei su kandiu. D: Thaorei khou kumma ntaoni khatni thei thaeng ni taek mak nga bam kandiu. J: He Christian meiguai nata nkha loumei pui Mariam. D: Aniu khang huainei nkha louwo, kapu, kanah, khatni bumaeng nthanmei jan khou Amen.
